creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Alex,

Thanks a lot for your contribution.

As this port should be updated along with deskutils/gxneur (maintained
by avl@), I am waiting for an approval to also update this
port (see ports/157336).

Once I get the approval, I'll update xneur with the attached patch (a
modified version of your original patch, since plist has changed).

Best regards,

--
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
http://www.martymac.org | http://contribs.martymac.org
